verification_instructions: Run 'npx tsc -b && npx vite build' to confirm no type errors and a successful build
environment_constraints: No test framework installed; verification is TypeScript compilation + Vite build
key_patterns: Zustand store at src/store/gameStore.ts; all styles in src/App.css (minified single-line blocks); components in src/components/; map positions defined as pixel coordinates in an 800x600 coordinate system in GameBoard.tsx and converted to percentages for positioning
directory_structure: src/components/ - React components; src/store/ - Zustand store; src/types/ - TypeScript types; src/utils/ - game logic; src/img/ - image assets; public/ - static assets
